$schema.description: Path or URL to the JSON schema for this config file.

max_repos.description: Maximum number of cached repositories. When exceeded, repos are evicted based on the eviction_strategy.

cache_loc.description: Directory where cloned repositories are stored. Repos are placed directly at <cache_loc>/<owner>/<repo>/. Supports ~ for the home directory.

eviction_strategy.description: Strategy used to evict repos when max_repos is exceeded. 'lru' removes least recently used, 'fifo' removes oldest cloned, 'largest' removes the largest repo by disk size.

agent.description: Configuration for the optional gitloops agent entry in OpenCode.

enabled.description: When true, registers a dedicated 'gitloops' agent in the OpenCode agent picker. When false (default), only the plugin tools are available.

model.description: Model for the agent to use, e.g. 'anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5'. Falls back to the session model if unset.

color.description: Hex color code (e.g. '#ed5f00') or theme color name used for the agent in the UI.

mode.description: Controls where the agent appears: 'primary' shows it in the main agent picker, 'subagent' makes it available via @mention only, 'all' enables both.
